messages.content: You compile narrative encounters into canonical SWMD-MICRO-0.1 JSON with stable schema.

Compile this encounter into canonical SWMD-MICRO-0.1 JSON. Keep schema identical.

ENC page_0021 turn=3..3
ORX opt_page_0021_0/opt_page_0021_0_r1 -> page_0022 | O:Advance the doctrine. | E:SET char_counter_archivist.Influence = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Influence),C(0.03)); SET char_counter_archivist.Influence = ADD(P(char_counter_archivist.Influence),MUL(P(char_counter_archivist.pTransgression_Order[char_mediator]),C(0.1))); SET char_counter_archivist.Transgression_Order = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Transgression_Order),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Countercraft = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Countercraft),MUL(P(char_counter_archivist.pTransgression_Order[char_mediator]),C(0.03))) | D:ARITHMETIC MEAN(P(char_civ.Embodiment_Virtuality),P(char_civ.Risk_Stasis),P(char_civ.pEmbodiment_Virtuality[char_counter_archivist]))
ORX opt_page_0021_0/opt_page_0021_0_v2_rxn2 -> page_0022 | O:Advance the doctrine. | E:SET char_civ.Embodiment_Virtuality = NUDGE(P(char_civ.Embodiment_Virtuality),MUL(P(char_mediator.pCosmic_Ambition_Humility[char_civ]),C(0.03))); SET char_mediator.Cosmic_Ambition_Humility = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Cosmic_Ambition_Humility),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Cosmic_Ambition_Humility = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Cosmic_Ambition_Humility),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Grudge = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Grudge),C(0.03)) | D:IF THEN(ARITHMETIC COMPARATOR(P(char_civ.Cosmic_Ambition_Humility),C(0.05)),ADD(P(char_civ.Hedonism_Austerity),P(char_civ.pCohesion_Fragmentation),C(0.12)),ADD(P(char_civ.Cohesion_Fragmentation),C(-0.06)))
ORX opt_page_0021_0/opt_page_0021_0_v3_rxn3 -> page_0022 | O:Advance the doctrine. | E:SET char_civ.Countercraft = NUDGE(P(char_civ.Countercraft),C(0.03)); SET char_civ.Influence = NUDGE(P(char_civ.Influence),C(0.03)); SET char_civ.Influence = NUDGE(P(char_civ.Influence),C(0.03)); SET char_counter_archivist.Hedonism_Austerity = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Hedonism_Austerity),MUL(P(char_civ.pInfluence[char_counter_archivist]),C(0.03))) | D:SUB(ADD(P(char_civ.Risk_Stasis),P(char_civ.pRisk_Stasis)),P(char_civ.Transgression_Order))
ORX opt_page_0021_1/opt_page_0021_1_r1 -> page_0022 | O:Advance, but hide the seams. | E:SET char_counter_archivist.Embodiment_Virtuality = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Embodiment_Virtuality),C(0.03)); SET char_counter_archivist.Grudge = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Grudge),C(0.03)); SET char_counter_archivist.Grudge = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Grudge),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Risk_Stasis = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Risk_Stasis),MUL(P(char_counter_archivist.pGrudge[char_mediator]),C(0.03))) | D:ADD(P(char_civ.Cohesion_Fragmentation),P(char_civ.pCohesion_Fragmentation),C(0.08))
ORX opt_page_0021_1/opt_page_0021_1_v2_rxn2 -> page_0022 | O:Advance, but hide the seams. | E:SET char_civ.Cohesion_Fragmentation = NUDGE(P(char_civ.Cohesion_Fragmentation),MUL(P(char_mediator.pCountercraft[char_civ]),C(0.03))); SET char_mediator.Countercraft = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Countercraft),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Hedonism_Austerity = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Hedonism_Austerity),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Hedonism_Austerity = ADD(P(char_mediator.Hedonism_Austerity),MUL(P(char_mediator.pCountercraft[char_civ]),C(0.1))) | D:MUL(ADD(P(char_civ.Transgression_Order),C(0.35)),ADD(P(char_civ.pInfluence[char_counter_archivist]),C(0.4)))
ORX page_0021_v2_opt3/opt_page_0021_0_r1 -> page_0022 | O:Advance the doctrine (Route 2). | E:SET char_civ.Embodiment_Virtuality = NUDGE(P(char_civ.Embodiment_Virtuality),C(0.03)); SET char_civ.Risk_Stasis = NUDGE(P(char_civ.Risk_Stasis),C(0.03)); SET char_civ.Risk_Stasis = ADD(P(char_civ.Risk_Stasis),MUL(P(char_civ.pEmbodiment_Virtuality[char_counter_archivist]),C(0.1))); SET char_counter_archivist.Transgression_Order = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Transgression_Order),MUL(P(char_civ.pEmbodiment_Virtuality[char_counter_archivist]),C(0.03))) | D:IF THEN(ARITHMETIC COMPARATOR(P(char_civ.Hedonism_Austerity),C(0.05)),ADD(P(char_civ.Influence),P(char_civ.pCountercraft),C(0.12)),ADD(P(char_civ.Countercraft),C(-0.06)))
ORX page_0021_v2_opt3/page_0021_v2_opt3_v2_rxn2 -> page_0022 | O:Advance the doctrine (Route 2). | E:SET char_counter_archivist.Cohesion_Fragmentation = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Cohesion_Fragmentation),C(0.03)); SET char_counter_archivist.Hedonism_Austerity = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Hedonism_Austerity),C(0.03)); SET char_counter_archivist.Hedonism_Austerity = NUDGE(P(char_counter_archivist.Hedonism_Austerity),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Cosmic_Ambition_Humility = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Cosmic_Ambition_Humility),MUL(P(char_counter_archivist.pHedonism_Austerity[char_mediator]),C(0.03))) | D:SUB(ADD(P(char_civ.Grudge),P(char_civ.pGrudge)),P(char_civ.Embodiment_Virtuality))
ORX page_0021_v2_opt3/page_0021_v2_opt3_v3_rxn3 -> page_0022 | O:Advance the doctrine (Route 2). | E:SET char_civ.Influence = NUDGE(P(char_civ.Influence),MUL(P(char_mediator.pRisk_Stasis[char_civ]),C(0.03))); SET char_mediator.Risk_Stasis = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Risk_Stasis),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Risk_Stasis = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Risk_Stasis),C(0.03)); SET char_mediator.Transgression_Order = NUDGE(P(char_mediator.Transgression_Order),C(0.03)) | D:ADD(P(char_civ.Countercraft),P(char_civ.pCountercraft),C(0.08))
